creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
For future updates, could you please make sure the commit message has the same format as the ones that were committed in the past?  For example, the previous update to the two ports was committed with this message:

    devel/{py-oci,oci-cli}: update to 2.134.0 / 3.48.0

    Changelog: https://github.com/oracle/oci-python-sdk/releases/tag/v2.134.0
    Changelog: https://github.com/oracle/oci-cli/releases/tag/v3.48.0

    PR:             281552

Try to make your commit message look like this one.
Please do not reupload this patch, but keep the format in mind for future updates.  You can leave the PR field out as the PR number is only known once you submit the bug (problem report).
